TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_bugan, title = bugan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/bugan} }

S.FORM: bugan 1. mkmugah-mkmugah saku ga mngungu saku kks'ang ay ni yaba mu. 2. pbugah-maha maki saku kya ga,pbugah saku ay. 3. ppbugah-yasa ppbugah saku lga,mhtuw yaba mu la. 4. mugah-nyux saku mugah na huzil qani gauw. 5. mnugah-mnugah saku mrusa maku//mnaki su inu,swa musu in ktay? 6. bnugah-bnugah maku gaw....

bugan 1. mkmugah-mkmugah saku ga mngungu saku kks'ang ay ni yaba mu. 2. pbugah-maha maki saku kya ga,pbugah saku ay. 3. ppbugah-yasa ppbugah saku lga,mhtuw yaba mu la. 4. mugah-nyux saku mugah na huzil qani gauw. 5. mnugah-mnugah saku mrusa maku//mnaki su inu,swa musu in ktay? 6. bnugah-bnugah maku gaw....
S.PHON: βuɣan *. mkmuɣaħ-mkmuɣaħ s~ɕaku ɣa mŋuŋu s~ɕaku kks~ɕʔaŋ aj ni jaβa mu. *. pβuɣaħ-maħa maki s~ɕaku kja ɣa,pβuɣaħ s~ɕaku aj. *. ppβuɣaħ-jas~ɕa ppβuɣaħ s~ɕaku lɣa,mħtuw jaβa mu la. *. muɣaħ-njux s~ɕaku muɣaħ na ħuzil qani ɣauw. *. mnuɣaħ-mnuɣaħ s~ɕaku mrus~ɕa maku//mnaki s~ɕu inu,s~ɕwa mus~ɕu in ktaj? *. βnuɣaħ-βnuɣaħ maku ɣaw....
